dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkDependencySetModifier

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkDependencySetModifier

  • public class JkDependencySetModifier
extends java.lang.Object
    This class allows modifying a JkDependencySet using a series of method calls.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      JkDependencySetModifier add(JkCoordinate coordinates)
      Adds a JkCoordinate to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier add(JkDependency dependency)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier add(JkDependencySet.Hint hint, java.lang.String coordinate)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier add(java.nio.file.Path file)
      Adds a file-based dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier add(java.lang.String coordinate, JkTransitivity transitivity, java.lang.Object... tokens)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier add(java.lang.String coordinate, java.lang.Object... tokens)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier addVersionProvider(JkVersionProvider versionProvider)
      Adds a version provider to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier addWithExclusions(java.lang.String coordinate, java.lang.String... exclusions)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier with exclusions.
      JkDependencySet get()
      Compiutes a JkDependencySet by applying the modifier function to an empty set.
      JkDependencySetModifier modify(java.util.function.Function<JkDependencySet,JkDependencySet> modifier)
      Modifies the JkDependencySet using the provided modifier function.
      JkDependencySetModifier move(java.lang.String moduleId, JkDependencySet.Hint hint)
      Moves a dependency within the JkDependencySetModifier,.
      static JkDependencySetModifier of()
      Returns a new instance of JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier remove(java.nio.file.Path file)
      Removes a file-based dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier remove(java.lang.String moduleId)
      Removes a dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
      JkDependencySetModifier removeAll()
      Removes all dependencies from the JkDependencySetModifier.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkDependencySetModifier of()
        Returns a new instance of JkDependencySetModifier.

      • add

        public JkDependencySetModifier add(java.lang.String coordinate,
                                   java.lang.Object... tokens)
        Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
        Parameters:
        coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version
        tokens - the tokens for formatting the coordinate (in case of variable version for instance)

      • addWithExclusions

        public JkDependencySetModifier addWithExclusions(java.lang.String coordinate,
                                                 java.lang.String... exclusions)
        Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier with exclusions.
        Parameters:
        coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version
        exclusions - the moduleIds to exclude (e.g. "a.group:a.name", "another.group:another.name", ...)

      • move

        public JkDependencySetModifier move(java.lang.String moduleId,
                                    JkDependencySet.Hint hint)
        Moves a dependency within the JkDependencySetModifier,. This is used to alter the order in which dependencies should be declared.

      • add

        public JkDependencySetModifier add(JkCoordinate coordinates)
        Adds a JkCoordinate to the JkDependencySetModifier.

      • add

        public JkDependencySetModifier add(java.nio.file.Path file)
        Adds a file-based dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.

      • add

        public JkDependencySetModifier add(JkDependency dependency)
        Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.

      • add

        public JkDependencySetModifier add(java.lang.String coordinate,
                                   JkTransitivity transitivity,
                                   java.lang.Object... tokens)
        Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
        Parameters:
        coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version
        transitivity - the transitivity of the dependency
        tokens - the tokens for formatting the coordinate (in case of variable version for instance)

      • add

        public JkDependencySetModifier add(JkDependencySet.Hint hint,
                                   java.lang.String coordinate)
        Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
        Parameters:
        hint - the hint for prioritizing the dependency
        coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version

      • addVersionProvider

        public JkDependencySetModifier addVersionProvider(JkVersionProvider versionProvider)
        Adds a version provider to the JkDependencySetModifier.

      • remove

        public JkDependencySetModifier remove(java.lang.String moduleId)
        Removes a dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
        Parameters:
        moduleId - the module id of the dependency to be removed (e.g a.group:a-module)

      • removeAll

        public JkDependencySetModifier removeAll()
        Removes all dependencies from the JkDependencySetModifier.

      • remove

        public JkDependencySetModifier remove(java.nio.file.Path file)
        Removes a file-based dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
        Parameters:
        file - the file representing the dependency to be removed

      • modify

        public JkDependencySetModifier modify(java.util.function.Function<JkDependencySet,JkDependencySet> modifier)
        Modifies the JkDependencySet using the provided modifier function. The modifier function takes a JkDependencySet as input and returns a modified JkDependencySet.
        Parameters:
        modifier - the function used to modify the JkDependencySet

      • get

        public JkDependencySet get()
        Compiutes a JkDependencySet by applying the modifier function to an empty set.
